title: Delayed Entrance
description: Create an animation that fades in after a 1-second delay, then stays visible.
hint: Use animation-delay and animation-fill-mode: backwards or both.
solution: .element { opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease 1s both; } @keyframes fadeIn { to { opacity: 1; } }

title: Pause on Hover
description: Create a spinning element that pauses when hovered.
startingCode: .spinner { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 4px solid #333; border-top-color: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }
solution: .spinner:hover { animation-play-state: paused; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

title: Staggered Grid Animation
description: Create a grid of items that animate in one by one with increasing delays.
hint: Use nth-child() with increasing animation-delay values.
startingCode: .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; } .item { animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease both; }
solution: .item { animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease both; } .item:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; } .item:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .item:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } /* etc */ @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

title: Animation Sequence with Fill Mode
description: Create a multi-step animation that shows different text at each step, with the text staying visible after each keyframe.
hint: Use forwards fill mode and animate opacity in steps.
solution: .text { animation: sequence 6s steps(3) forwards; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; } @keyframes sequence { 0% { width: 0; } 33% { width: 33.33%; } 66% { width: 66.66%; } 100% { width: 100%; } }
